name: Laika Compliance Automation API
what_it_does: Compliance operations platform with REST API — automating SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, and other compliance programs with continuous control monitoring, vendor risk management, evidence collection, security policy management, and custom audit workflows.
use_cases: Querying compliance control status for executive dashboards and board reporting
Pulling vendor risk assessment results for third-party security program management
Automating evidence collection from integrated cloud services via webhook
Syncing employee security training completion data with HR systems via API
Integrating compliance status with customer trust center for automated security posture updates
not_for: Trust center publishing for customers (use SafeBase or Whistic for that)
Penetration testing and vulnerability assessment services
Security monitoring and incident detection (use SIEM for that)
best_when: A startup to mid-market company pursuing SOC 2 certification or multiple frameworks simultaneously, wanting to combine compliance automation with vendor risk management in one platform.
avoid_when: You only need basic SOC 2 prep without vendor risk features (use Secureframe or Sprinto for cost), or you're a large enterprise with dedicated compliance team.

auth.notes: API token from Laika account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for control status changes and evidence updates. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Cloud service integrations use separate OAuth2 flows.

pricing.paid_tiers: Compliance $500/month; Full Platform (with vendor risk) $900/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: New York-based company. Founded 2019. Raised $50M. Series B. Combines compliance automation + vendor risk management + policy management. 400+ integrations for evidence collection. Human compliance advisor support included. Alternative to Drata/Vanta with vendor risk bundled.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for controls, evidence, vendors, policies, and users. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation — primarily for integration partners. Compliance data requires understanding of control framework. Evidence collection automation via 400+ cloud integrations (separate from API). Webhook for status changes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Control status reads idempotent. Vendor assessment reads idempotent. Evidence reads idempotent. Policy reads idempotent by ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Cloud service integrations use OAuth2 (separate from API key) — must configure in UI
Control framework understanding required — SOC 2 controls have specific IDs
Evidence collection is automated via integrations, not manually via API
Vendor risk assessments may have human review steps — async workflow required
Annual contract typical — API access may require contract upgrade

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Compliance platform itself holds sensitive security posture data — high-trust relationship. Cloud service OAuth tokens stored by Laika — evaluate data sharing implications.
